final:
module johnson_counter_10bit(
    input clk,            // Chip clock signal.
    input reset,          // Synchronous reset signal.
    output [9:0] count    // Counter output signal with a data width of 10 bits.
);

reg [9:0] obf_counter;        // Counter register.

always @(posedge clk)
    if (reset) obf_counter <= 10'b0000000000;           // Reset to zero if reset is active.
    else obf_counter <= {~obf_counter[0], obf_counter[9:1]};    // Johnson obf_counter operation.

assign count = obf_counter;                            // Output obf_counter value.

endmodule
